services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every part of your roof system
services_section.subheading: From leak detection to full replacement — handled right the first time

services.title: Roof Inspection & Leak Detection
services.description: Full roof assessment to find exactly what's wrong. No surprises, no upselling.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: Complete tear-off and installation with integrated systems for better protection.

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Quick response for emergency repairs and insurance claim support.

services.title: Shingle Replacement
services.description: Individual shingle repair and replacement to stop leaks before they spread.

about.heading: Houston answers his phone
about.body: We're a Raleigh roofing team that shows up when we say we will. One call gets you Houston, not a call center.

reviews.name: Harry P.
reviews.text: Found a wet spot in my garage ceiling and needed someone fast. Houston responded quickly and did a complete roof inspection to locate the problem.

reviews.name: Michelle F.
reviews.text: Houston and his team were fantastic. Picked them for their reviews and thoroughness — they delivered. Great communication from start to finish.

reviews.name: Jarrod S.
reviews.text: Houston's team did an amazing job replacing my roof. His knowledge gave my home a much needed upgrade with better protection and appeal.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where we work in the Triangle
service_areas.subheading: Houston covers Raleigh and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's actually wrong?
cta.body: Call Houston directly. Real inspection, honest assessment, upfront pricing.
